records.culinary_uses: Young tender tips can be cooked as a spring green or steeped fresh or dried for tea.
records.medicinal_uses: Traditional lymphatic and urinary support; cooling herb often used as a fresh infusion.
records.notes: Low sprawling annual with whorled leaves, rough sticky stems, and narrow lance-shaped pointed leaves. Tiny white flowers followed by clinging burr-like seeds. Often found in rich disturbed ground, hedgerows, moist edges, and thickets.
